title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hero MotoCorp

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hero MotoCorp
jsonLd.description:
Hero MotoCorp is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hero MotoCorp:
Hero MotoCorp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp!
